title: Site Admin - 1 year contract
description:
Job Responsibilities:

  • Copying, scanning and filing of documents.
  • Input staff timesheet into Company's inhouse system.
  • Maintain proper site photos documentation.
  • Assist in safety documentation (if any).
  • Update site manpower report daily.
  • Coordinate with HR on staff training needs and welfare.
  • Update site personnel training records for record purpose.
  • Ordering and tracking of materials.
  • Coordinate with supplier and transporter for materials delivery.
  • Arrange DO and prepare equipment timesheet.
  • Other adhoc duties as assigned by supervisor.

Job Requirements:

  • O level certification.
  • At least 1 year of administrative experience in Singapore construction industry.
  • Comfortable working in site office container environment.
  • Good communication and interpersonal skills.
  • Able to work independently.

Other information:

  • Site location: Jurong East

postedCompany.description:
Bachy Soletanche Singapore Pte Ltd has been providing innovative geotechnical and foundation engineering solutions in Singapore since the mid 1970s. As a leader in the industry our expertise successfully delivers technically challenging projects.


An uncompromising commitment at a corporate level to prioritise safety performance has resulted in award-winning initiatives developed by Bachy Soletanche Singapore.


During the 1970s, Bachy Soletanche contributed to developing water infrastructure projects in Singapore. The company was incorporated in 1982, and has been involved in the development and construction of Singapore’s Mass Rapid Transit (MRT) from its earliest phases to date. The company diversified into geotechnical and foundation works for the private sector on major projects such as SUNTEC and Bugis Junction while continuing to participate in public sector construction projects such as Central Ministries Building and the New Supreme Court. 


All the while, Bachy Soletanche has continued to innovate with the introduction of specialist equipment, such as the Hydrofraise, and award winning designs, such as the retaining walls for The Sail@Marina Bay.

Bachy Soletanche Singapore is a wholly-owned subsidiary of the Soletanche Bachy group of companies, the world’s largest geotechnical engineering group employing over 9,000 permanent staff comprising 60 nationalities. 


Drawing on the group’s network of more than 1,000 engineers and managers and projects executed in over 100 countries, Bachy Soletanche Singapore provides clients with the full range of the techniques and services of an internationally renowned specialist.


Singapore is the regional office for the group’s activities in the Asia Pacific Region.
postedCompany.name: BACHY SOLETANCHE SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
